title: Best robot lawn mower deal: Save 27% on the Mova Lidax Ultra 3000
excerpt: Choose zones, set the schedule, decide on cutting length, and forget you ever pushed a lawn mower.
content_html:
SAVE $800: The Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for $2,199, down from the list price of $2,999. That's a 27% discount and the best price we've seen at Amazon.

Credit: Mova

$2,199 at Amazon
$2,999 Save $800

We wait all year for long summer nights spent outside. It's the best time of the year to gather friends and family in the yard for some relaxation or an outdoor movie night. It's also an ideal time to finally catch up on Kindle books reclined in a lawn chair. If you love being out in the yard, but don't love the maintenance that comes with it, check out this deal.

As of July 23, the Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for $2,199, marked down from the normal price of $2,999. That's a 27% discount that takes $800 off the price. This marks the lowest price we've seen at Amazon.

Mashable Trend Report

Similar to how we use robot vacuums to keep the floors clean indoors, a robot lawn mower is willing to take over the chore of keeping the grass cut. The Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 is designed to tackle yards that have 0.75 acres of grass. It can handle mowing on slopes that measure up to 80 degrees, and it can get over obstacles that measure up to 2.4 inches tall, like rocks and tree roots.

The Mova uses six blades on each of its two cutting disks, and its AI features include avoidance of over 300 common obstacles, such as lawn games, pots, and shrubs. From the app, you can set up to 150 mowing zones to keep the front yard mowed once a week and the back once every 10 days. You can also select cutting heights between 1.2 and 3.9 inches.

Since the Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 robot lawn mower is sitting at the lowest we've seen at Amazon, make the upgrade to automated lawn care. It's perfect for keeping a lawn well-manicured.

content_html_zh:
节省 800 美元：Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 割草机器人在亚马逊上售价 2,199 美元，低于标价 2,999 美元。 这是 27% 的折扣，也是我们在亚马逊见过的最优惠的价格。

图片来源：Mova

亚马逊 $2,199 $2,999 节省 $800

我们一整年都在等待在外面度过漫长的夏夜。 这是一年中与朋友和家人聚集在院子里放松身心或享受户外电影之夜的最佳时机。 这也是最终躺在草坪椅子上阅读 Kindle 书籍的理想时机。 如果您喜欢在院子里玩耍，但不喜欢随之而来的维护，请查看此优惠。

截至 7 月 23 日，Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 割草机器人在亚马逊上的售价为 2,199 美元，低于正常价格 2,999 美元。 这是 27% 的折扣，价格可以减少 800 美元。 这标志着我们在亚马逊看到的最低价格。

可混搭趋势报告

与我们使用机器人吸尘器保持室内地板清洁类似，机器人割草机愿意接管保持割草的苦务。 Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 专为处理拥有 0.75 英亩草地的庭院而设计。 它可以在高达 80 度的斜坡上进行割草，并且可以越过高达 2.4 英寸的障碍物，例如岩石和树根。

Mova 的两个切割盘各使用六个刀片，其 AI 功能包括避开 300 多个常见障碍物，例如草坪游戏、盆栽和灌木。 通过该应用程序，您可以设置多达 150 个割草区域，使前院每周割草一次，后院每 10 天割草一次。 您还可以选择 1.2 至 3.9 英寸之间的切割高度。

由于 Mova Lidax Ultra 3000 机器人割草机的价格是我们在亚马逊见过的最低价格，因此请升级为自动化草坪护理。 它非常适合保持草坪修剪整齐。
